extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ Primož won with a 300m attack on the finishing circuit, rounding YATES after second acceleration following initial move.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma executed successful Plan B with ROGLIČ attacking after original strategy failed, showing tactical depth in multi-leader setup.
ALAPHILIPPE attacked pre-emptively on penultimate circuit lap with YATES following, forcing rivals to respond early and drain reserves.
UAE's POGAČAR notably absent from attacks despite stage suiting him, suggesting strategic conservation before Sasotetto mountain stage.
LAFAY positioned perfectly on ROGLIČ wheel at 300m, revealing UAE's awareness that late 17.1km circuit attacks favor timing over distance.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: double-acceleration tactic within final 300m demonstrates recovered explosive power after injury layoff
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: early solo attack on circuit shows returning form pre-classics, creating tactical blueprint for similar punchy finishes
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: present in finale and podium but unable to counter ROGLIČ late acceleration, lacks top-end sprint after positioning
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: negative: crashed and struggled before incident, suggesting form issues pre-race despite favorite status
rider_signals.VLASOV Alexander: neutral: animated in finale pulling for BORA leader but team lacked numbers to control finishing circuit
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: neutral: brought to finale by CARTHY but couldn't respond to ROGLIČ move, indicating good positioning but missing decisive punch
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: positive: attacking and dragging GEOGHEGAN HART into contention shows improved form and willingness to animate race
